3046530.name: JustBox
3046530.description:
ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー

This work is a game created at Byking Co., Ltd. training for new employees.
It may not function properly depending on your PC environment.
Also, unintended problems may occur in the game.
Please take note of this.

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー

Dodge, charge, attack!
Just Box is a 2D-action game where you control a box continuously circling round a stage (and a boss).
While moving, avoid obstacles and enemy attacks...find your opening...and strike!

- 2-Button Control
Control your Box with just "Dodge" and "Attack". "Dodge" incoming obstacles and attacks...
then charge-up and "Attack" right back when you see an opening!

- Perfect Dodge
A Perfect Dodge is executed when avoiding damage at the last possible moment!
Doing so powers-up your Box, increasing attack.



◇Combo Attack
- Combo Attack When powered-up, time your press just as you land to execute a Combo Attack!
Combo Attacks rocket you back across the stage and if it connects,
you'll have a chance at dishing out a series of hits and a lot of damage!
